summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are planned. Open PRs with proof, review, stale-mergeability, or maintainer-signal blockers are kept or scoped to maintainer review; already-closed PRs are kept closed; security-sensitive refs are routed only to central security handling.
